title: Donor
description: One row per tissue donor in the SAHA consortium.

age.description: Donor age in years at time of tissue collection.

age_group.description: Broad age category for access-tier reporting.

ethnicity.description: Self-reported ethnicity using NIH standard categories.

comorbidities.description: List of relevant comorbidities or diagnoses.

tissue_source_institution.description: Institution that collected or provided the tissue.

tissue_source_country.description: Country of tissue collection (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, e.g. US, DE).

consent_level.description: Maximum data access tier permitted by donor consent.
